_comment: Windows Claude Code Settings Template for WSL2 or native Windows/Git Bash (LEGACY mcpServers format)
_instructions: Copy this to ~/.claude/settings.json inside WSL2/Ubuntu, or to the matching Claude settings path for native Windows/Git Bash. Replace op:// references with your actual 1Password paths. Replace YOURUSERNAME and WINDOWS_USERNAME. Remove _comment, _instructions, _legacy_note, _git_bash_note, and _path_examples keys before using.
_legacy_note: The mcpServers block below is the legacy hand-rolled format. The recommended path is now `claude mcp add <name>` (see guides/04-mcp-servers.md). This template still works and is kept for reference, but new users should prefer the CLI command.
_git_bash_note: Native Windows Claude Code can use Git Bash. If Claude cannot find it, keep the env block below and point CLAUDE_CODE_GIT_BASH_PATH at Git for Windows' bin\bash.exe. WSL2 students can leave this env value unused or remove it.

brave-search._comment: Get API key from brave.com/search/api - free tier available

gmail._comment: Requires Google Cloud project with Gmail API enabled. See guides/04-mcp-servers.md. WSL2 example path is shown. Git Bash/native Windows students can use C:\Users\WINDOWS_USERNAME\.claude\credentials\gmail-credentials.json.

google-calendar._comment: Uses same Google Cloud credentials as Gmail

notion._comment: Create integration at notion.so/my-integrations, then share pages with it

slack._comment: Create Slack app at api.slack.com/apps with channels:read, chat:write, channels:history scopes

filesystem._comment: Gives Claude access to specific directories. WSL2 paths are active below. For Git Bash/native Windows, replace them with C:\Users\WINDOWS_USERNAME or /c/Users/WINDOWS_USERNAME paths from _path_examples.

_windows_notes: Use one path style per active MCP server config. Do not leave incompatible WSL2 and Git Bash paths active in the same filesystem args list.
For native Windows/Git Bash, CLAUDE_CODE_GIT_BASH_PATH usually points to C:\Program Files\Git\bin\bash.exe.
Git Bash one-session env style: export CLAUDE_CODE_GIT_BASH_PATH="/c/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe"
Your Windows files are accessible at /mnt/c/Users/[WindowsUsername]/ from WSL2 or /c/Users/[WindowsUsername]/ from Git Bash
WSL2 cron runs only when WSL2 is active. For true scheduled tasks, use Windows Task Scheduler to invoke WSL2.
Claude Code can run inside WSL2 through Ubuntu, or on native Windows with Git Bash/PowerShell
The 1Password CLI (op) runs separately in WSL2 and native Windows/Git Bash
